description_long: This is a modern laptop with a matte black brushed metal finish, featuring a full keyboard and a large touchpad below it. The screen is open and displays a whimsical desktop wallpaper with a grassy hill, blue sky, and a partially visible face peeking from the bottom right. The laptop lid is adorned with several colorful stickers, including stylized characters, logos, and symbols, most of which appear to reference gaming culture. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row, and the touchpad is centrally located. No visible ports are present on the sides or back in the provided views. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for use in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or co-working spaces.
description: A sleek black laptop with a brushed metal finish, colorful gaming stickers on the lid, and a screen displaying a playful desktop wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a grassy hill wallpaper and a full keyboard layout.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the keyboard, touchpad, and the vivid screen content.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the laptop lid covered with multiple colorful gaming-themed stickers.
description_view_3: Angled rear-right view emphasizing the sticker placement on the lid and a partial view of the keyboard.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying a desktop wallpaper with a grassy hill, blue sky, and a partially visible face.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row, no numeric keypad, standard key arrangement.
attribute_sticker_placement: Multiple colorful stickers are placed on the laptop lid, featuring gaming-related graphics and logos, covering much of the back surface.
